brief_justification: Correct answer (shelf) with valid theory-of-mind reasoning; traces three levels: actual location, observation window, belief state; suppression of 'static snapshot bias' shows some meta-cognitive awareness; verifies by checking Maria's location during the move; acknowledges belief vs reality distinction but doesn't quantify uncertainty; mentions actual location (desk) but doesn't deeply evaluate why Maria might check there instead; full derivation chain from book trajectory to Maria's knowledge state is explicitly shown and reproducible
